qa_pairs.question: What are the steps to monitor and view details of active jobs using the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To monitor your active jobs in Open OnDemand, navigate to the '''Jobs''' tab and select '''Active Jobs'''. You can filter the displayed jobs using the '''Filter''' text box at the top right, and sort them by clicking on the column headers, such as by job status (running, completed, or failed). For more specific details about an individual job, including its start/end time, node list, and the account charged, click on the > symbol to the left of that job. Additionally, to view all jobs in the queue, select '''All Jobs''' from the drop-down menu at the top right.

qa_pairs.question: Which external portal provides a more comprehensive view of job details than the Open OnDemand 'Active Jobs' interface?
qa_pairs.answer: A more comprehensive and detailed view of your jobs, beyond what is available in the Open OnDemand 'Active Jobs' interface, can be accessed through the [https://my.scinet.utoronto.ca myscinet portal].
